emails.subject: RE: Bullets
emails.body: RE: Bullets I'll will try to have them by 4:00pm. Thanks, Kim.

emails.subject: Bullets
emails.body: Bullets Audrey, Lorraine is providing bullets for the team this week. Thanks, Kim.

emails.subject: Bullets
emails.body: Bullets Audrey, Lorraine will be coordinating bullets for me tomorrow. Thanks, Kim.

emails.subject: RE: Bullets
emails.body: Thanks for the reminder. I'm looking for the list now, I'll bring it over. K. To: Watson, Kimberly

emails.subject: bullets
emails.body: Audrey, Would you please email me the final bullets from last week. I don't necessarily go look for the final copy since I am the one who combines all the bullets. Thanks, Kim.

emails.subject: RE: bullets
emails.body: RE: bullets Please see attached.... Audrey D. Robertson Transwestern Pipeline Company email address: audrey.robertson@enron.com (713) 853-5849 (713) 646-2551 Fax To: Robertson, Audrey

emails.subject: Bullets
emails.body: Bullets Audrey, As a matter of practice, would you automatically email me the final bullets document after Steve approves? I will then save it in my word file and use it to start the next weeks bullets. Thanks, Kim. :>)

emails.subject: RE: Bullets
emails.body: RE: Bullets Kim, I do save these on the shared drive under TW-NNG/TW Desk/Weekly Bullets or better Why not let me save a copy to your drive under Weekly Bullets. I'll create a folder for you if you don't have one. Okay? Okay.... adr Audrey D. Robertson Transwestern Pipeline Company email address: audrey.robertson@enron.com (713) 853-5849 (713) 646-2551 Fax To: Robertson, Audrey
